title: senecio sublyratus
intro: Senecio sublyratus, also known as Groundsel, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Groundsel include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. Groundsel can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
